phrases.intent_en: Ask where to pay oversized luggage fee
phrases.text_local: Onde pago a taxa de bagagem volumosa?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAH-goo AH TAH-shuh DIH buh-GAH-zhayng voo-loo-MAW-zuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese transport hubs typically centralize ancillary fees at dedicated service desks near primary access points for efficiency.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao atendente no balcão principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih NOO bahl-KOWN preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the attendant at the main counter.

responses.english: Ask the attendant at the main counter.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih NOO bahl-KOWN preen-see-PAHL.
responses.french: Pergunte ao atendente no balcão principal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the taxi stand outside is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o ponto de táxi do lado de fora?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW POHNG-too DIH TAHK-see DOO LAH-doo DIH FAW-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: The taxi stand is located outside the terminal.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o ponto de táxi.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW POHNG-too DIH TAHK-see.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the taxi stand.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the taxi stand.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW POHNG-too DIH TAHK-see.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o ponto de táxi.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso recarregar o cartão Andanças?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo reh-kuh-rih-GAHR AW kuh-ruh-TOWN ahnng-DAHNNG-suhsh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Balcão de Bilhetes Principal, onde pode recarregar o cartão Andanças.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW bahl-KOWN DIH bee-LYEH-tihsh preen-see-PAHL, OHNG-dih PAW-dih reh-kuh-rih-GAHR AW kuh-ruh-TOWN ahnng-DAHNNG-suhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Main Ticket Counter, where you can reload the Andanças card.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Main Ticket Counter, where you can reload the Andanças card.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW bahl-KOWN DIH bee-LYEH-tihsh preen-see-PAHL, OHNG-dih PAW-dih reh-kuh-rih-GAHR AW kuh-ruh-TOWN ahnng-DAHNNG-suhsh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Balcão de Bilhetes Principal, onde pode recarregar o cartão Andanças.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the taxi stand outside is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a praça de táxis exterior?
phrases.cultural_note: Designated taxi ranks outside Portuguese transport terminals are strictly regulated and positioned immediately adjacent to primary pedestrian exits.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, junto à saída principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too AH SUHEE-duh preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, next to the main exit.

responses.english: Good morning, next to the main exit.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too AH SUHEE-duh preen-see-PAHL.
responses.french: Bom dia, junto à saída principal.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the main ticket counter is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o balcão principal de bilhetes?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN preen-see-PAHL DIH bee-LYEH-tihsh?
phrases.cultural_note: The main ticket counter is a central service point.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Balcão Principal de Bilhetes.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW bahl-KOWN preen-see-PAHL DIH bee-LYEH-tihsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Main Ticket Counter.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Main Ticket Counter.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW bahl-KOWN preen-see-PAHL DIH bee-LYEH-tihsh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Balcão Principal de Bilhetes.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso recarregar o meu cartão Andanças?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo reh-kuh-rih-GAHR AW MEHOO kuh-ruh-TOWN ahnng-DAHNNG-suhsh?

likely_response.local: Dirija-se ao balcão da bilheteira principal para recarregar o cartão Andanças.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW bahl-KOWN DUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh preen-see-PAHL PUH-ruh reh-kuh-rih-GAHR AW kuh-ruh-TOWN ahnng-DAHNNG-suhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the main ticket counter to reload your Andanças card.

responses.english: Go to the main ticket counter to reload your Andanças card.
responses.phonetic: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW bahl-KOWN DUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh preen-see-PAHL PUH-ruh reh-kuh-rih-GAHR AW kuh-ruh-TOWN ahnng-DAHNNG-suhsh.
responses.french: Dirija-se ao balcão da bilheteira principal para recarregar o cartão Andanças.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o balcão de recarga do cartão Andanças?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN DIH reh-KAH-ruh-guh DOO kuh-ruh-TOWN ahnng-DAHNNG-suhsh?

likely_response.local: Pergunte a um atendente onde recarregar o Andanças.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih OHNG-dih reh-kuh-rih-GAHR AW ahnng-DAHNNG-suhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask a staff member where to reload the Andanças card.

responses.english: Ask a staff member where to reload the Andanças card.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih AH OONNG uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih OHNG-dih reh-kuh-rih-GAHR AW ahnng-DAHNNG-suhsh.
responses.french: Pergunte a um atendente onde recarregar o Andanças.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the departure display is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o painel de partidas programadas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW peye-NEHL DIH puh-ruh-TEE-duhsh proog-ruh-MAH-duhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Display boards in regional Portuguese terminals are centrally located to minimize passenger congestion near boarding zones.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, na sala central de esperas.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH SAH-luh sayngt-RAHL DIH SHPEH-ruhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, in the central waiting hall.

responses.english: Good morning, in the central waiting hall.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH SAH-luh sayngt-RAHL DIH SHPEH-ruhsh.
responses.french: Bom dia, na sala central de esperas.

phrases.cultural_note: In Portuguese bus terminals, platforms are often numbered and located outdoors.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a plataforma 5.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh SEEN-koo.

responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh SEEN-koo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a plataforma 5.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso recarregar o meu cartão Andanças?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo reh-kuh-rih-GAHR AW MEHOO kuh-ruh-TOWN ahnng-DAHNNG-suhsh?

likely_response.local: Dirija-se à bilheteira principal para recarga do cartão Andanças.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh preen-see-PAHL PUH-ruh reh-KAH-ruh-guh DOO kuh-ruh-TOWN ahnng-DAHNNG-suhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the main ticket counter to reload your Andanças card.

responses.english: Go to the main ticket counter to reload your Andanças card.
responses.phonetic: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh preen-see-PAHL PUH-ruh reh-KAH-ruh-guh DOO kuh-ruh-TOWN ahnng-DAHNNG-suhsh.
responses.french: Dirija-se à bilheteira principal para recarga do cartão Andanças.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to pay oversized luggage fee
phrases.text_local: Onde pago a taxa de bagagem extragrande?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAH-goo AH TAH-shuh DIH buh-GAH-zhayng ehst-ruhg-RAHNNG-dih?
phrases.cultural_note: The booth is a separate counter from the main ticket counter.

likely_response.local: No balcão 7, à esquerda da entrada principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: NOO bahl-KOWN SEH-tih, AH SHKEH-ruh-duh DUH ayngt-RAH-duh preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the oversized luggage fee booth.

responses.english: Go to the oversized luggage fee booth.
responses.phonetic: NOO bahl-KOWN SEH-tih, AH SHKEH-ruh-duh DUH ayngt-RAH-duh preen-see-PAHL.
responses.french: No balcão 7, à esquerda da entrada principal.

phrases.cultural_note: Platform numbering in Azorean terminals follows a linear layout, with higher numbers typically positioned further from the main concourse.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a plataforma cinco.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh SEEN-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to platform five.

responses.english: Follow the signs to platform five.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh SEEN-koo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a plataforma cinco.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o ponto de táxi?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW POHNG-too DIH TAHK-see?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o ponto de táxi.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW POHNG-too DIH TAHK-see.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the taxi stand.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the taxi stand.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW POHNG-too DIH TAHK-see.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o ponto de táxi.
